{{Quote|Smells good. Just like we make back home.|Luke Skywalker, on nausage made by Mara Jade Skywalker|<ref name="Star by Star" />}}
'''Nausage''' was a grilled [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] from the<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that was served with [[dustcrepe]]s in the early [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="CSWE" /> A favorite breakfast meal on Tatooine, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] enjoyed the dish.<ref name="Star by Star" />

Although [[Gender/Legends|she]] was a poor [[Chef/Legends|chef]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] attempted to make the dish for breakfast while on [[Eclipse Station]]<ref name="Star by Star" /> in [[27 ABY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Not wishing to leave her quarters for other food and end her private [[Time/Legends|time]] with her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] and [[Youngling/Legends|infant]] son, [[Ben Skywalker]], Jade Skywalker persisted in making the meal despite [[Color/Legends|browning]] the dustcrepes and puffing the nausage, which was blackened. When Luke Skywalker exited the [[Refresher/Legends|refresher]] shortly after, he commented that the food smelled good and sampled her nausage, which he claimed was just like that made on Tatooine.<ref name="Star by Star" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nausage first appeared in the [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'', by [[Troy Denning]].<ref name="Star by Star" />
